text: I was able to create a tasks list, complete the list in full and stay focused for a full days work, and not get sidetracked or feel the least bit tired. Day after day, I continued to work better than I had been able to for years. Lack of appetite was a problem at first. Edgy when the medicatin is wearing down (10 hours after taking.) Had to go to a psychiatrist to get it prescribed. Check ups every 3 months to determine effectiveness. So far everything is a go! I cannot express how this has changed my life!
